title: The Cartographer's Tongue
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced cartographer in a city that rearranges its streets each dawn is hired by a silent patron to map a building that changes size depending on who looks at it.
long_description: A disgraced cartographer in a city that rearranges its streets each dawn is hired by a silent patron to map a building that changes size depending on who looks at it.
